valid.name: explicit-privileges

invalid.name: grant-all
invalid.code:
GRANT ALL ON t TO u;
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON t TO PUBLIC;

errors.message: `GRANT ALL` (or `GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES`) is opaque — list the privileges you actually need (e.g. `SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE`) so the grant is auditable and adding a new PostgreSQL privilege in a future release does not silently extend it.
